title: Context Source Routing: long context vs RAG vs escalation
content: Established a 3-step Context Source Routing chain for agents to determine where to look when context is insufficient. Step 1: Check loaded context (standing, session, working). Step 2: Query the Brain via brain_query for precedent, cross-session knowledge, and durable lessons — mandatory before Propose/Escalate-tier decisions. Step 3: Escalate to human if neither source resolves the gap. Codified in Part 2 spec (Context Source Routing section), SO-11 (new routing chain rule), and enforced by brain_context_router.sh hook that detects Propose/Escalate decisions made without a preceding brain_query.
